case_title: ZAHIRA SALEM DBA GRAND SOUTHERN HOTEL VS. MORELIA BALAM ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ZAHIRA SALEM DBA GRAND SOUTHERN HOTEL MIRANDA, K PROP  MGR AS TO DEFENDANT BALAM, MORELIA MAY, PEDRO TEC DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT BALAM, MORELIA MAY, PEDRO TEC
